metadata.description: Default paper experiments for fixed-point QNN verification
metadata.note: Each experiment is intended to run once. MNIST is intentionally limited to 25_25 for paper reproducibility; larger MNIST models can be run manually.

runs.notes: Default Iris benchmark weights.
